title: Custom Tees for Gracie's Birthday
excerpt: Love getting email requests for custom shirts from scrapbookers who have fun ideas they want to turn into reality. For Gracie's first birthday, Vanessa asked us to make 3 tees. Vanessa's husband is a great sport and we made the…
body:
Love getting email requests for custom shirts from scrapbookers who have fun ideas they want to turn into reality. For Gracie's first birthday, Vanessa asked us to make 3 tees. Vanessa's husband is a great sport and we made the Minnie Mouse shirt for him as masculine as possible. I suppose it was actually Mickey since he didn't get a bow.

As much fun as it is to create these, the best part is seeing the photos and smiling faces. Thanks for sharing these, Vanessa!
